name: telegram-bridge
description: Bridge between Telegram and VS Code Copilot / AI Chat. Send messages from Telegram directly into the VS Code chat window.

commands.title: Telegram Bridge: Nastavit jako aktivní workspace
Telegram Bridge: 📤 Odeslat vlastní odpověď do Telegramu

telegramBridge.allowedChatIds.description: Povolená Telegram Chat ID (nechte prázdné pro povolení všech – POZOR: bezpečnostní riziko!)

telegramBridge.autoStart.description: Automaticky spustit bridge při startu VS Code

enumDescriptions: Inject (recommended): message is placed into the existing chat input box. Auto-submitted after a short delay (see autoSubmit / submitDelay). Full conversation context preserved.
Direct: message is auto-submitted immediately to the current Copilot Chat thread.
Participant (@tg): two-way mode — message goes through the @tg participant, Copilot responds and the reply is sent back to Telegram. Has its own isolated context.
telegramBridge.chatMode.description: How Telegram messages are delivered into VS Code Chat.

telegramBridge.autoSubmit.description: In inject mode: automatically submit the message after a short delay. When false, the text appears in the input box and you press Enter manually.

telegramBridge.submitDelay.description: In inject mode with autoSubmit enabled: milliseconds to wait before submitting. Gives you time to see and optionally cancel the message (Escape). Default: 1500 ms.

telegramBridge.prefixMessage.description: Add a '📱 Name:' prefix before the message in the chat input.

enumDescriptions: No workspace context injected. Copilot answers from general knowledge only.
Prepend @workspace to every message. Copilot searches the codebase before answering. (Recommended)
Prepend /new (agent mode). Full agentic capabilities: file read/write, terminal, search.
telegramBridge.workspaceContext.description: Controls whether Copilot has access to your workspace files when answering messages from Telegram.

chatParticipants.name: tg
chatParticipants.description: Telegram Bridge – přijímá zprávy z Telegramu a odpovídá přes Copilot. Odpoví zpět do Telegramu.

languageModelTools.name: telegram_reply
languageModelTools.modelDescription: Sends a text message to the Telegram user who last sent a request through the Telegram Bridge extension. Call this tool when you have completed a task that was requested via Telegram, to notify the user on their mobile phone. The user may be away from the computer (e.g. on a couch) and is waiting for a result summary. The message supports Telegram Markdown formatting: *bold*, _italic_, `inline code`, ```multiline code block```. Keep the message informative but concise: summarise what was done, which files were changed, and any important results or warnings.

message.description:
The message text to send to Telegram. Supported Telegram Markdown: *bold*, _italic_, `code`, ```lang
block
```. Summarise the completed work and its outcome.

scripts.package: npm run compile -- --mode production && vsce package --no-dependencies
